segments.text: That's cool.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02

segments.text: Unless there's anything else, I think we have five minutes to save in our rest of our day.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02

segments.text: Yeah, sounds good.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: Thanks, folks.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: We'll talk soon then.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_03

segments.text: Cool.
